message:
fix(core): initialise checksum tail in preflight dir block too

Apply the same checksum-tail sentinel fix to
ext4_preflight_dir_entry_insert's temporary block.  While the
current code path doesn't trigger the parse error (add_entry
succeeds before reaching the tail), this prevents future regressions
if the preflight block is ever parsed by parse_dir_block.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
